title: Vinmeen Lyrics Thegidi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Vinmeen
Singer: Abhay Jodhpurkar, Saindhavi Prakash
Lyricist: Kabilan
Movie: Thegidi (2014)
Music: Nivas K Prasanna

Vinmeen vidhayil nilavaai mulaithen
penmeen vizhiyil enaye tholaithen.
mazhayin isai kaettu
marale thalaiyaattu.
malalai mozhi pola
manadhil oru paattu.
ini neeyum naanum ondraai
serndhal kadhal irandu ezhuthu. (2)

Vinmeen vidhayil nilavaai mulaithen
penmeen vizhiyil enaye tholaithen.

Naan pesaadha mounam ellaam
uun kangal pesum.
Unnai kaanaadha neram ennai
kedikaaram ketkum.
Madal medhu thoorum mazhai polave
manadhodu neethaan nulaindhayadi

Mudhal penthaaney neethaaney
ennakullaara aerppeney.
ini neeyum naanum ondraai
serndhal kadhal irandu ezhuthu.

Oru pennaaga unmel naaney
peraasai kondaen.
unnai munnaaley paarkkum podhu
pesaamal nindren.

Edharkkaaga unnai edhirpaarkkiren
enakkulle naanum dhinam ketkiren
inimel naaney neeyaanen.
ivan pinnaale poveney

ini neeyum naanum ondraai
serndhal kadhal irandu ezhuthu.

Vinmeen vidhayil nilavaai mulaithen
penmeen vizhiyil enaye tholaithen.
mazhayin isai kaettu
marale thalaiyaattu.
malalai mozhi pola
manadhil oru paattu.
ini neeyum naanum ondraai
serndhal kadhal irandu ezhuthu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Vinmeen?

The song Vinmeen expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of two lovers yearning for each other.

What is the plot context of Thegidi related to this song?

In Thegidi, the song plays during a romantic moment, highlighting the connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Vinmeen?

The song is sung by Abhay Jodhpurkar and Saindhavi, whose voices blend beautifully to create a captivating duet.

Who composed the music for Vinmeen?

The music for Vinmeen was composed by Nivas K Prasanna, known for his melodious tunes.

When was Vinmeen released?

Vinmeen was released on February 11, 2014, as part of the movie Thegidi.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vinmeen, the protagonists express their deep feelings for each other through poetic lyrics and a soothing melody. The song encapsulates the essence of romance, portraying the beauty of love and the pain of separation. As the characters navigate their emotions, the music enhances the narrative, making it a pivotal moment in Thegidi. The collaboration between Abhay Jodhpurkar and Saindhavi adds a unique charm, leaving listeners enchanted.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vinmeen from Thegidi is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Abhay Jodhpurkar and Saindhavi, this song takes you on a melodic journey that resonates deeply. The heartfelt lyrics by Kabilan combined with Nivas K Prasanna's soulful composition make it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: I have bloomed like the moon in the sky, and I have lost myself in the gaze of a girl. Listening to the music of the rain, I dance joyfully. In my heart, there is a song like a sweet word. If you and I come together, love will write itself in two letters.
I have bloomed like the moon in the sky, and I have lost myself in the gaze of a girl.
In my silence, your eyes speak everything. The time when I can't see you calls out to me. Like rain falling on a roof, my heart is tied to you.
You are the first girl, and you are everything to me. If you and I come together, love will write itself in two letters.
As a girl, I have taken a desire upon myself. I stand silently, watching you without speaking.
I look at you and wonder why I am waiting. I hear you inside me every day, and from now on, you are me. I will go behind you.
If you and I come together, love will write itself in two letters.

I have bloomed like the moon in the sky, and I have lost myself in the gaze of a girl. Listening to the music of the rain, I dance joyfully. In my heart, there is a song like a sweet word. If you and I come together, love will write itself in two letters.
